name: fintorq-code-style
description: Official code style and development standards for the Fintorq project.

interface.longDescription: Review and implement Fintorq Java code using the project's established Spring Boot, Gradle, MyBatis-Plus, testing, and security conventions.
defaultPrompt: Review this code against Fintorq standards.
Implement this Java change using Fintorq conventions.
Check this module for Fintorq code style violations.
